results.title: Skim Reviews - 2026
results.content:
Irritated by Adobe Reader and unable to afford the full Adober suite anymore, I saw Skim recommended for academics like me who have to review lots of PDFs. Great for that purpose! No complaints...praise to the coders!
 owenmille  Posted 2022-04-26

  Great
 allbot  Posted 2022-02-24

  I LOVE Skim, but version 1.6.9 has a bug: it places an annoying black rectangle over the part of page containing an error, which remains there after correcting and after quitting Skim. So I re-installed 1.6.8 and all is well! Thank you for your (usually faultless) work! Much appreciated.
 damodarvilasdas  Posted 2021-12-24 [...] Have you ever spent hours working on filling out forms only to have all your work deleted? With SkimPDF you can get this done easily and entirely free of charge! That's right. Your fillable fields are NOT SAVED... and it doesn't even tell you that! It just kindly lets you delete all your hard work without a peep. The program is very easy to use and has some handy features, but when you're doing something terribly important, it will let you down.
 furlosk  Posted 2019-10-13

  By far the best, most capable and quickest PDF viewer/annotator for macOS there is. Has tons of power-user and academic features, and a perfect support.

results.title: Skim Reviews - 2026 - Page 2
results.content:
Skim-app is an excellent free PDF reading and note taking software, for the macOS. Though the skim-app is free, it is still better than anything else I have tested, on macOS, Windows, and iOS. Skim-app ought to be mandatory in any curriculum, and a part of the software library of any public school or university. Skim-app assists in comprehensive and deep reading. I have experienced serious troubles with this app, caused by the lackluster implementation from Apple, of the underlying PDF-things which this app relies on. You will probably encounter such impingements from Apple in the future also – beware of the urge for updating your computer system. I miss the possibility of sorting bookmarks, and of the possibility of starting up the app without opening any files, using a key at startup [...] Skim doesn't have basic measuring tools for drawings, so I'm rating features as poor. It also has a limited help function - it took me a while to figure out that when I opened it, it sits on the task bar but doesn't open a programme window; it waits for me to use Finder to open a file. So I'm also marking it down for not conforming to usual usability modes. However it does look quite pretty and seems to have the basic text markup tools, slightly more than are offered by OSX's Preview application. PS To the user who requested coloured notes... OSX's Preview app offers that.
 nitin\_sf  Posted 2014-04-06

  Easier and more feature-full than OSX builtin viewer.
 mmx-mostafa  Posted 2014-04-03 [...] Skim is awesome. Yet, it doesn't work on OS X El Capitan at this moment. Shows only black screen for PDF previews, while thumbnails work fine.
 zhenyuanzhou  Posted 2015-05-05

  Much smoother than Acrobat when page up and down.
 fernando\_gomez  Posted 2015-05-01

  I use it in my everyday. Excellent piece of software.
 cogitoxin  Posted 2015-01-28

  I found that every time I tap with 3 fingers a snapshot will appear but actually I just want to look up a world in dictionary. Can the snapshot function be turned off?
 imartinez921  Edited 2014-08-31

results.title: Read Customer Service Reviews of skims.com
results.content:
This is extremely frustrating. Customer service keeps passing the responsibility around without solving the problem. If you're considering ordering from SKIMS, be aware that if you need to return something, you may end up waiting for your money indefinitely.

Very disappointing experience.

July 12, 2026

Unprompted review

Useful

Share

RS

reshma sankar US•4 reviews

Jul 12, 2026

Image 36: Rated 1 out of 5 stars

## I ordered a 34F in SKIMS ULTIMATE…
I ordered a 34F in SKIMS ULTIMATE BALCONETTE PUSH-UP BRA | CLAY CLAY / 34 / F x 1. [...] I received the replacement today, but unfortunately it doesn’t fit either. The band size (36) is now too tight, whereas the band on my original bra fit perfectly. At the same time, the cups are slightly too large. This makes me question the consistency of SKIMS’ sizing. It appears that the sizing or manufacturing has changed, even though I ordered the exact same product in the exact same size.

What frustrates me most is that I have had to deal with multiple orders, returns, and customer service interactions because of what seems to be an inconsistency in SKIMS’ sizing rather than an issue on my end. I also chose to pay with AfterPay, and I am concerned that I may end up being charged for return shipping or other costs, even though the problem appears to be caused by the product itself. [...] They shipped me a 34DDD which was too small when tired on it store and the agent said order F. Shipment came wrong size and then the agent in customer service Cliar ( chat attached) keep telling me “ oh you received the correct item we updated all the labeling and probably missed a mislabeled. And she kept saying that over and over. The tag on the bra, label and packaging all says 34DDD and the bra fit small as when I tried on in store. So if the cup size shipped was correct you didn’t think it would fit. These customers service are trained to be dishonest. Then when i created the rerun skim charge me $6.00 for shipping fee. This is absolutely a horrible company and for it to have a khardahain name

On it. It’s such a shame for this type of terrible service.

July 10, 2026

results.title: SKIM - pdf option - Other Software & Development - Literature & Latte Forums
results.content:
# SKIM - pdf option

In another post, Simon pointed out that Skim is a free alternative to Preview.

Give Skim a try. It has a better annotation system than Preview, and yet is way lighter than Abode (you’d need the pro version anyway). And it’s free. I’ve made it my default pdf reader instead of Preview.

Thanks Simon - a really excellent tip. I have done the same.

skim-app.sourceforge.net/

There is a useful Wiki page on the application here:

skim-app.sourceforge.net/wiki/in … /Main\_Page

:slight_smile:

:slight_smile:

Cheers LL, my pleasure. A few things I like about Skim:
